description: Containerize and deploy the ACME Inventory Management Platform located at ~/projects/acme-inventory/. The application is a multi-component system that manages product catalog, warehouse inventory, and order processing with background task execution. Study the source code to understand the architecture, dependencies, and configuration. Create all necessary Docker artifacts (Dockerfiles, docker-compose.yml, Nginx configuration) from scratch and deploy the complete stack using Docker Compose. The final deployment must be fully functional at http://localhost:8080 with a working REST API that supports product listing, inventory queries across multiple warehouses, order creation, and asynchronous background order processing via a task queue.
